name: Hot Vidalia Onion Spread
recipeIngredient: Fresh apple slices - dipped in lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine onions, mayo, and cheese in a medium bowl.
3. Pour mixture into a 1-quart baking dish and smooth the top.
4. Bake at 325 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Remove from oven and blot excess oil with paper towels.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
7. Serve warm with apple slices and garlic bagel chips. Yield: 3 to 4 cups or 10 servings.
